common.vision: Unite supporters through shared symbolism conflict energy and Trump centered identity

comud.vision: A charged community where identity status and participation feel powerful and rewarding

equilibrium.vision: Convert attention and loyalty into tradable value and recurring engagement

guide.vision: Guide holder behavior through incentives events rankings and status based participation

success.vision: Become the dominant political meme asset by concentrating attention and influence

vow.pom: Official Trump is framed as the only official Trump meme and uses a strong symbolic identity tied to loyalty spectacle and collective participation around the Trump brand
vow.vision: Turn political fandom into a high signal meme culture with coordinated attention
